h2List: Launch is Arguably the First Example of Dragon Ball Introducing a Character Only to Ditch Them Immediately
Akira Toriyama Came Up With Launch's Trip To Korin's Tower
extracted.ogTitle: A Forgotten DBZ Filler Episode Akira Toriyama Helped Write Solved Launch's Disappearance 36 Years Ago
extracted.description: Launch's disappearance has been a meme in the Dragon Ball fandom for years, but a forgotten DBZ episode already explained her absence 3 decades ago.
